description.en: Scope of Work
Covers installation, maintenance, dismantling, and testing of Christmas lights.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Installation, maintenance, dismantling, and testing of Christmas lights

description.en: The tender covers installation, maintenance, dismantling, and testing of Christmas lights.
Contract Terms
Requirements related to the length of the service agreement.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Submit tender for 1, 2, or 3-year service agreement

description.en: Contractors must submit tenders for a 1-year, 2-year, or 3-year service agreement.
Requirements for handling changes to the contract.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Variations notified by Town Clerk and agreed in writing

description.en: Any variations to the contract will be notified by the Town Clerk and agreed in writing between both parties.
Evaluation Criteria
Ensures the bid meets all mandatory requirements.
The contract will be awarded to the company that complies with all written requirements.
Evaluates past performance and capability to deliver similar projects.
The contractor must have satisfactory references.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Demonstrated ability to deliver similar projects (25% weight)

description.en: Evaluation includes demonstrated ability to deliver similar projects to a high quality, weighted at 25%.
Assesses cost-effectiveness and budget alignment.
The contract will be awarded to the company that offers the best value for money.
Evaluation includes price within the budget, weighted at 25%.
Measures the quality and overall value of the proposal.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Quality and value for money (30% weight)

description.en: Evaluation includes quality and value for money, weighted at 30%.
Evaluates the use of local resources and skills.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Use of local resources and skills (20% weight)

description.en: Evaluation includes use of local resources and skills, weighted at 20%.
Payment Terms
Payments tied to specific project milestones or completion stages.
Payment will be made upon satisfactory completion of works.
Health & Safety
Adherence to legal and regulatory requirements.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Comply with all relevant H&S legislation, codes of practice, and regulations

description.en: Contractors must comply with all relevant health and safety legislation, codes of practice, and regulations.
Measures to protect the public from hazards.
Measures must be taken to minimize any risk to the public.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Do not leave tools on pavement

description.en: Tools must not be left on the pavement where they could present a trip hazard.
Safe parking and vehicle operations.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Park vehicles without contravening restrictions or causing obstruction

description.en: Any motor vehicle or plant machinery must be parked so as not to contravene parking restrictions or cause obstruction.
Provision of health and safety documents.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Produce Health & Safety Information prior to installation

description.en: The successful contractor must produce Health & Safety Information prior to installation. The Health & Safety Information must include a Schedule of Works and any other relevant documents such as General Health & Safety at Work Policy, accreditation certificates, and staff training certificates.
Identification and evaluation of risks.
The Health & Safety Information must include a Risk Assessment.
Detailed safe work procedures.
The Health & Safety Information must include a Method Statement.
Testing of safety anchor points.
All anchor points must be tested.
description.original: All anchor points tested.

description.en: Technical Specifications
Requirements related to compliance with BS 7671 for erection, testing, and maintenance.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Erection, testing, and maintenance in accordance with BS 7671

description.en: Erection, testing, and maintenance must be carried out in accordance with the latest Wiring Regulations (BS 7671).
Requirement for work to be undertaken by a competent person per BS 7671.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Work undertaken by a competent person per BS 7671

description.en: Work must be undertaken by a competent person as laid out in BS 7671.
Requirements for testing lights and feeder pillars to current standards.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electric testing of lights to current standards

description.en: Perform electric testing of lights to current standards.
Test all electric feeder pillars.
Requirement for lights to be fully functional prior to installation.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Lights fully functional prior to installation

description.en: All lights and features must be fully functional before installation.
description.original: All lights and features must be fully functioning prior to installation.

description.en: Requirement to provide details of proposed LEDs and product warranty.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Provide details of proposed LEDs and product warranty

description.en: Details of proposed LEDs and product warranty must be included.
description.original: Details of proposed LEDs and product warranty

description.en: Insurance
Requirements related to public liability insurance coverage.
The contractor must be adequately insured with public liability cover.
Requirements for submitting insurance documentation with the tender.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Include copy of current insurance certificate with tender

description.en: A copy of the current insurance certificate must be included with the tender response.
Pre-Tender
Requirements related to site visits before tender submission.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Make necessary site visits before submitting tender

description.en: The contractor is expected to make any necessary site visits and satisfy themselves of access arrangements and other necessary information before submitting a tender.
Pricing
Requirements for fully inclusive cost proposals.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tender fully inclusive of all costs

description.en: The tender must be fully inclusive of all costs.
Requirements for pricing individual items separately.
All items must be individually priced in the tender.
description.original: To cost all items individually.

description.en: Requirements for stating extra charges such as call-outs and replacements.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cost of any replacement anchor points

description.en: Include cost of any replacement anchor points.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: State additional call-out charges on schedule

description.en: Any additional call-out charges must be clearly stated on the provided schedule.
description.original: Additional call out charges must be stated on the schedule.

description.en: Monitoring
Oversight of work progress by Town Council representative.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Town Council representative will monitor work regularly

description.en: A Town Council representative will monitor the work carried out on a regular basis.
Reporting and handling of concerns through Town Clerk.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Concerns reported to Town Clerk for action

description.en: Any concerns will be reported to the Town Clerk who will agree an appropriate course of action with the Contractor.
Tender Process
Dates and deadlines for tender evaluation activities.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tenders considered by Town Council on 9 June 2026

description.en: All tenders will be considered by the Town Council on 9 June 2026.
Timeline for notifying tender outcomes.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Response to tenders week commencing 15 June 2026

description.en: All tenders will receive a response from the Town Council week commencing 15 June 2026.
Installation
Key dates and milestones for installation and dismantling.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Installation testing and lighting readiness timeline

description.en: Installation testing must begin on 1 November 2026, and the lights must be in working order no later than one week prior to the switch-on date of Saturday 28 November 2026.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Dismantle lights after 6 January, no later than 12 January

description.en: Lights must be dismantled and removed as soon as possible after 6 January each year, but no later than 12 January.
description.original: The lights are to be dismantled and removed as soon as after 6 January each year as possible, but no later than 12 January each year.

description.en: Measures to minimize disruption during installation.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimize disruption to traffic and pedestrians

description.en: Work must be undertaken with little disruption to traffic and pedestrians, and with consideration for the environment.
Requirements for the official switch-on day.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Contractor present on switch-on day (28 Nov 2026) to manually switch on lights

description.en: The contractor must be present on the day of the switch-on, Saturday 28 November 2026, to manually switch on the lights after a countdown. Attend the switch on event.
Configuration of automatic timers for the lights.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Set lights to automatic timers (4pm-10pm weekdays, 4pm-11pm weekends)

description.en: After switch-on, lights must be set to automatic timers: on at 4pm, off at 10pm weekdays, and 4pm to 11pm weekends.
Inspection of anchor points and structural integrity.
Check all anchor points.
Installation and activation of various light sets.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install and activate 23 sets of pea lights to memorial garden

description.en: Install and activate 23 sets of pea lights to the memorial garden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install and activate 1 set of pea lights to tree on the square

description.en: Install and activate 1 set of pea lights to the tree on the square.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install and activate 1 set of lights to fir tree in memorial garden

description.en: Install and activate 1 set of lights to the fir tree within the memorial garden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install festoons to front of Harwood's building & butchers' shop

description.en: Install festoons to the front of Harwood's building and butchers' shop.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install string lights from top of church street zig-zagging up high street to social club

description.en: Install string lights from the top of church street zig-zagging up the high street to the social club.
Installation of decorative features, motifs, and signs.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install features to poles within memorial garden

description.en: Install features to the poles within the memorial garden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install 'welcome to Broseley' sign across high street

description.en: Install 'welcome to Broseley' sign across the high street (Victoria Hall to Bridal Shop).
Install 2x snow fall column motifs.
Removal
Dismantling and removal of all lighting fixtures.
Remove all lights after the festive period.
Maintenance
Requirements for on-demand maintenance visits including festival periods.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All-inclusive call outs during festival period for lights erected and maintenance checks

description.en: Include cost of all-inclusive call outs during the festival period for lights erected and maintenance checks.
Planned maintenance run-throughs at specified intervals.
The contractor must perform two scheduled inspections of the display to check functionality and address minor faults.
description.original: We require two scheduled run throughs of the display to check everything is functioning properly and to attend to any minor faults.

description.en: Immediate response for major faults with 24-hour availability.
The contractor must provide a call-out within 24 hours for major faults such as complete motif failure, vandalism, storm damage, or traffic accidents.
description.original: We require a call out within 24 hours for major faults including, but not limited to, complete failure of a motif or light string, extreme damage caused through vandalism, storms or road traffic accident.

description.en: Verification of lights and features during non-operational periods.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Test lights and features during downtime

description.en: All lights and features must be tested during downtime, with minor repairs like replacing bulbs and fixing connections undertaken.
description.original: All lights and features are to be tested during downtime and any minor work required such as replacing bulbs and fixing faulty connections is to be undertaken.

description.en: Communication
Procedures for notifying the buyer about defective items requiring major repair.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Notify BTC immediately of defective items needing major repair

description.en: The contractor must notify BTC immediately of any defective lights or features that require major repair at additional cost or cannot be repaired.
description.original: The contractor will notify BTC immediately of any defective lights and features that require major repair at additional cost or that cannot be repaired so replacement can be considered in good time.

description.en: Administrative
Rules and deadlines for submitting the tender.
Tenders must be submitted by the deadline of 2 June 2026.
description.original: Deadline for submission: 2 June 2026

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Submit tender in writing in sealed marked envelope

description.en: Tenders must be submitted in writing in a sealed envelope marked 'Tender', addressed to the Town Clerk.
description.original: Tenders are to be submitted in writing in a sealed marked envelope addressed to the Town Clerk. The envelope should be clearly marked 'Tender'.

description.en: Procedures for opening tenders and evaluating them.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tenders opened after deadline by Town Clerk with two councillors

description.en: Tenders shall be opened by the Town Clerk in the presence of at least two councillors after the submission deadline.
description.original: Tenders shall be opened by the Town Clerk in the presence of at least two councillors after the deadline for submission of tenders has passed.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tenders considered at properly convened meeting

description.en: Tenders will be reported to and considered by the Town Council at a properly convened meeting.
description.original: Tenders will be reported to and considered by the Town Council at a properly convened meeting.

description.en: Documentation
Requirements related to insurance certificates.
A current public liability certificate must be included with the tender.
description.original: Current public liability certificate

description.en: Requirements for specific industry or scheme certifications.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Provide Highway Electrical Registration Scheme certificate

description.en: A Highway Electrical Registration Scheme certificate must be included.
description.original: Highway Electrical Registration Scheme

description.en: Requirements for health and safety documentation.
A Health and Safety Policy must be provided with the tender.
description.original: Health and Safety Policy

description.en: Requirements for any other pertinent documents or certificates.
Any other pertinent documents or certificates must be provided.
description.original: Any other pertinent documents/certificates

description.en: Legal & Compliance
Requirements related to procurement regulations and legal frameworks.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Follow Standing Order 17 and Bribery Act 2010

description.en: All tenders are subject to the Town Council's Standing Order 17 and the Bribery Act 2010.
description.original: All invitations to tender are subject to the Town Council’s Standing Order number 17 and the terms of the Bribery Act 2010.

description.en: Requirements ensuring ethical behavior and preventing improper influence.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No contacting councillors or staff outside prescribed process

description.en: Contractors must not contact councillors or staff to encourage or support their tender outside the prescribed process.
description.original: No contractor shall contact councillors or staff to encourage or support their tender outside the prescribed process.
